# AfroCiné — African Cinema Discovery Platform
# https://african-cinema.vercel.app

AfroCiné is a comprehensive database and discovery platform for African cinema,
covering films from Nigeria (Nollywood), Cameroon, South Africa, Ghana, Egypt,
Senegal, Mali, Côte d'Ivoire, and across the African continent and diaspora.

## What we cover
- Feature films, documentaries, and short films from African directors
- Classic African cinema (pre-2000) including FESPACO winners
- Contemporary Nollywood releases
- Francophone African cinema
- North African (Arab Africa) cinema
- Community-submitted films and editorial curation

## Data sources
Films are sourced from TMDB, director filmography sweeps, Wikipedia film lists,
FESPACO festival selections, Africa Magic Viewers Choice Award nominees, and
community submissions reviewed by our editorial team.

## API / Data
We do not currently offer a public API.

## Contact
https://african-cinema.vercel.app/contact
